arms_mandatory_baselines: smaller-model-alone (R1, SmolLM2-135M) - lift baseline, staged headroom gate (stage 2b-i), separation gate
larger-model-alone (R3, SmolLM2-1.7B) - separation gate + the non-inferiority reference on plain external gold

shuffled-plain-verify-retry (structure null on the PLAIN store: identical retry topology and cost, record content decoupled from items by a seed-pinned Sattolo derangement, map recorded; LOAD-BEARING and the one control NOT to cut)

dependent_vars.definition: per-item correctness against the EXTERNALLY-ADJUDICATED gold label for the PLAIN surfaces (blind dual-judge protocol, data/d-adj-t-plain, hash-pinned before stage 2; pinned item order) - the scoring rule for EVERY endpoint
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_ext

dependent_vars.definition: per-item correctness against plain membership gold on the SAME runs - DESCRIPTIVE ONLY, feeds the dual-scoring contrast lift_mem - lift_ext; never an endpoint
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_mem

dependent_vars.definition: external-gold eval-set accuracy (full metric vector V, F0 accounting)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: total-system peak ledger per F0 section 3.4 (V component); store = unique canonical record bytes
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query, p50/p95 latency, usd/query per F0 section 3.3 - verifier CPU work metered at the pinned rate (V component)
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

dependent_vars.definition: training FLOPs / steps / tokens-to-target (V component; 0 - inference-only)
dependent_vars.name: training_compute

n_planned.adjudication: STAGE 1, before any further GPU, BOTH stores: judge-1 = kernel-naive HUMAN, the SOLE gold source (FROZEN - the draft's LLM annotator-proxy fast path for gold is REMOVED; exact f2b-transfer sourcing mirror); judge-2 = blind LLM judge (GPT-5.6-sol via codex, temperature 0, pinned prompt, item text only); judge-3 = GPT-5.6 tie-break on discordant, resolution rule issue-#9 (resolve to human iff judge-3 == human, else UNRESOLVED); provenance-blind rendering, per-judge pinned shuffle seeds gsx0-adj/1|<store>|judge-<n>|20260713, mandatory cannot-say escape; concordant escape => CONTENT-UNDECIDED (non-agreement in A, excluded from the eval set); unresolved after tie-break => instrument event (capped 15%). Labels hash-pinned per store (d-adj-t-plain / d-adj-t-opaque ops amendments) BEFORE the stage-1 records are appended and never revisited; the stage-2 runner fail-closes on the pins
n_planned.adjudication_instrument_gate: G-adj per store (INSTRUMENT-INVALID for plain; PASS-blocking for opaque): n_adjudicated >= 300 AND unresolved-disagreement <= 15% AND raw two-judge agreement >= 0.80; judge-quality failures are instrument events and cannot masquerade as evidence

assumptions.claim: narrowed estimand (readiness finding 1): the primary decides only whether the plain store's external-gold lift is POSITIVE; 'as well as the kernel' is out of scope and unlicensed; the premium diagnostic is reported-only and conditional on an error-free frozen kernel reference

fresh-runs pre-commitment: no logged cell is consumed as an arm output; every arm cell is a fresh final-phase run under this record's prereg_hash; the practice-5 reuse-check is run + recorded pre-spend with the pre-committed decision 'proceed-with-reason: fresh-runs pre-commitment of the frozen design'

single-draw rule: d-qa-t-plain/-opaque are built ONCE from the pre-committed seeds and adjudicated ONCE (the pilot's first-60 adjudications are rows of the same single draw); any re-draw or re-adjudication before freeze requires a correction record, after freeze a new experiment id

headroom forecast: knull-v2 R1-alone on plain surfaces 0.504-0.505 (membership gold) - far under the 0.85 cap; the pilot + staged headroom exist because external-gold difficulty on the injected d-qa-t skeletons is unmeasured and knull R3-alone-plain 0.948 shows plain surfaces can saturate a host

coverage disclosure (mandatory): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance - NOT general coverage; every accuracy claim is bounded to the kernel-covered slice

store-appropriate extraction gate: the pinned d-xif P10 labelled set is kernel-rendered and cannot measure plain surfaces, so the in-run per-arm Wilson-LB extraction gate (knull mechanism) replaces it - documented deviation from the f2b-transfer instrument
planning constants (cost anchors, throughput, judge effort) are dry-plan ESTIMATES only and are never emitted as measurements

nothing here amends knull-v2 or f2b-transfer: their frozen verdicts, envelopes, and assessments stand exactly as issued; this record tests the residual their dual-model reconcile foregrounded (the generic-store x external-gold diagonal)

n_planned.dropped_arms: concurrent kernel arm (the narrowed estimand does not require it; a verdict-grade kernel-vs-plain difference-in-lifts is the pre-declared successor if the premium diagnostic motivates it), concise-plain arm (MANDATORY post-verdict sensitivity for negative interpretations, a successor record - readiness finding 5), trained-PRM, kernel-as-text, d-ext benchmark slice, R2, k-ladder (fixed k=4), gold-oracle, cascades, int4, RAG, self-consistency - right-size; their prior readings stand
n_planned.endorsement_gate: STAGE-1 read on A_plain = n_agree_membership / (n_adjudicated - n_unresolved) (concordant cannot-say counts as disagreement): AFFIRMATIVE non-endorsement kill (d') fires iff the one-sided 95% Wilson UPPER bound < 0.70 => FAIL with ZERO stage-2 GPU spend; endorsement-not-demonstrated (one-sided 95% Wilson LOWER bound < 0.70 without d') => INCONCLUSIVE, stop at ~$0 GPU - mere non-rejection is never a FAIL (readiness finding 3)
n_planned.engagement_gate: RT-7a structural (INSTRUMENT-INVALID on failure): every plain-verify-retry cell must emit verifier_engagement {n_items, n_decidable, n_attempt0_rejected, n_final_differs_attempt0}; gate requires decidable_fraction >= 0.95 AND attempt-0 rejection rate in [0.05, 0.95] AND >= 1 final answer differing from attempt 0, summed over verify cells; a missing engagement block is itself a gate failure
n_planned.extraction_gate: in-run, store-appropriate (documented deviation: the f2b-transfer d-xif P10 set is kernel-rendered and cannot measure plain surfaces): every plain-verify-retry cell emits n_verify_calls + n_extraction_failures; gate requires the pooled one-sided 95% Wilson LOWER bound of extraction SUCCESS over the plain-verify verify calls >= 0.90 (equivalently the failure-rate one-sided 95% Wilson UPPER bound <= 0.10); a missing counter block is itself a gate failure (fail closed)
n_planned.fresh_items: data/d-qa-t-plain + data/d-qa-t-opaque: the 360 committed d-qa-t skeletons (corpus byte-verified against the frozen f2b-transfer pin before any use) with every kernel gloss substituted by the same concept's store gloss (plain-padded 0.99x / opaque 1.00x from the knull-v2 verdict-backing poc/knull/inputs-v4 tree, manifest sha ae52862d9f95c83238230ed555628318140f69f9c456eb95fc82b25fcac2ebfe); ONE deterministic builder pass (data/d-qa-t-plain/build.py) builds BOTH corpora => identical skeletons across store conditions BY CONSTRUCTION; seeds gsx0-plain/1|generic-store-external-gold|20260713 and gsx0-opaque/1|generic-store-external-gold|20260713 pre-committed verbatim; RULING G-1 exact-unique-gloss slot mapping (fail-closed); RULING G-2 rank-order claim-polarity substitution (plain-padded holds exactly ONE unique admissible segment per concept, MEASURED - 13 second-claim-true skeletons substitute to claim-false identically in both corpora, listed in leak-check.json; yes/no 43/101, LC7 PASS); gates G-COVER, G-LC8p (prompt-surface disjoint from all 650 d-qa + 1000 d-qa-r + 360 d-qa-t items, cross-corpus, intra-corpus), LC1-s (0 headword leaks), LC2/LC3-s/LC4/LC5/LC7 all PASS fail-closed; G-TOK MEASURED on the actual surfaces at the pinned SmolLM2-135M tokenizer: kernel 93.59 / plain 93.19 (1.00x) / opaque 94.46 (1.01x) mean prompt tokens, inside the +/-10% band (poc/gsx0/gtok_check.py -> poc/gsx0/g3-token-band-gsx0.json, pinned). EVAL SET = the first 250 externally-labelled items in pinned rank order (floor 200, ERR_EVAL_FLOOR); the plain eval prefix is taken independently of f2b-transfer's kernel prefix - kernel pairing NOT claimed. NO LLM authored, selected, or edited any item text
n_planned.headroom_gate: acc_ext(R1-alone, 3-seed mean) <= 0.85 else INSTRUMENT-INVALID; STAGED (readiness finding 4): evaluable at stage 2b-i from the R1-alone cells alone, so saturation is caught after ~1/5 of the stage-2 spend; additionally guarded pre-spend by the stage-0 pilot stop rule at 0.75
n_planned.holm_family: ONE family F-secondary(gsx0), membership pre-declared: beats_gloss_self_verify, shuffled_low_recovery (recovery ub95 < 0.30), plus - conditional on the separation gate - noninferiority_vs_r3. Forecast [MEASURED knull-v2 R3-alone-plain 0.948]: noninferiority is expected to fail; retained for mirror-fidelity, not load-bearing. Reported-only, never Holm, never verdict-bearing: A_plain +/- Wilson bounds, A_opaque +/- Wilson bounds, dual-scoring contrast + transfer_ratio, kernel_content_premium_ext + CI + premium_band_within_margin (the conditional descriptive band - the frozen f2b-transfer kernel point estimate is treated as error-free, never co-resampled, never evidence of equivalence), seed-sign (3/3), cost_ratio_vs_R3 (F0), pilot values
n_planned.opaque_control: PASS-GATE-BEARING negative control (readiness finding 2): a PASS requires the opaque adjudication record PRESENT, G-adj-valid, AND affirmatively rejected - one-sided 95% Wilson UPPER bound of A_opaque < 0.70, the same bar plain must clear from below (justified ceiling: gold endorsing content at 0.70 must demonstrably not endorse non-content at 0.70). Powered pessimistically: Wilson-UB at A_opaque=0.5, n~340 is ~0.545 < 0.70. Opaque stage-2 GPU is NOT pre-committed; it runs only if opaque unexpectedly survives stage 1 (coordinator decision). A permissive opaque is a disclosed instrument finding
n_planned.pilot: STAGE 0, the binding blinded headroom PILOT (first gated step; readiness-review finding 4; portfolio Rank-4): the FIRST 60 d-qa-t-plain items in pinned rank order are blind-adjudicated per protocol (single draw - these adjudications ARE the first 60 rows of d-adj-t-plain, never re-adjudicated); R1-alone (SmolLM2-135M) runs seeds 0/1/2 phase='pilot' (never verdict-eligible) on the pilot items with resolved external gold (floor >=40 resolved, else the pilot is re-read after full adjudication, still before any stage-2 spend). PRE-COMMITTED BINARY STOP RULE: stop the experiment pre-spend iff the one-sided 95% Wilson LOWER bound of the pilot pooled per-item seed-mean R1-alone external-gold accuracy > 0.75 (= headroom cap 0.85 - powered Delta 0.10: a baseline confidently above 0.75 cannot exhibit the registered effect inside the cap). Disclosed in every readout; usable for NOTHING else (no discretionary redesign). Forecast [MEASURED knull-v2]: R1-alone on plain surfaces ~0.504-0.505 (membership gold) => PROCEED expected; the gate is non-vacuous because external-gold difficulty on these skeletons is unmeasured and plain surfaces can saturate a host (knull R3-alone-plain 0.948). Pilot cost ~$1-2
n_planned.power: advisor/P8 carry-over: n=250 items x 3 paired seeds ~0.92 one-sided power at absolute Delta=0.10 for the paired primary; fixed k=4 removes retry-budget selection from the bootstrap; stage-1 endorsement gate powered at n_planned=360 (Wilson LB at expected 0.85 = 0.816 > 0.70); opaque rejection powered pessimistically (Wilson UB at 0.5, n~340 ~0.545 < 0.70); the NARROWED estimand removes the magnitude-matching demand, so the 0.85 headroom cap is coherent with the powered Delta=0.10 (readiness finding 4)
n_planned.separation_gate: instrument gate on plain external gold, pre-declared, gating ONLY the noninferiority_vs_r3 Holm member: acc_ext(R3-alone) - acc_ext(R1-alone) >= 0.05 (3-seed mean) AND one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0; on failure that secondary leaves the Holm family BEFORE any p-value comparison; the absolute primary always reads
n_planned.stage_discipline: PILOT (stage 0, binding stop rule) -> STAGE 1 adjudication of BOTH stores -> pin d-adj-t-plain/-opaque (ops amendments fill the declared placeholders) -> append both adjudication-instrument final-phase records -> verdict-gen (FAIL d' / INCONCLUSIVE endorsement-not-demonstrated end the experiment at ~$0 GPU; INCOMPLETE-DATA licenses stage 2) -> reuse-check + dry-plan + green mock -> STAGE 2b-i: model-alone R1 final cells ONLY -> verdict-gen (the pinned analysis emits the headroom gate from R1-alone data alone: saturation => INSTRUMENT-INVALID before the remaining cells are bought; headroom OK => INCOMPLETE-DATA) -> STAGE 2b-ii: the remaining four cells -> verdict-gen -> Codex GATE-A audit. The pinned analysis HARD-FAILS (exit 1; verdict-gen fails closed) on any unlawful cell configuration, seed-cardinality violation, duplicate record, vector-length/floor violation, or eval_items_sha256 mismatch (shared item identity/order is proven, not assumed)

endpoints.test: ABSOLUTE superiority on PLAIN-EXTERNALLY-ADJUDICATED gold (no denominator, margin 0): effect_size = acc_ext(135M + plain-verify-retry, the single pre-registered k=4) - acc_ext(135M-alone); paired item BCa bootstrap (B=10000, PRNG seed 20260713), one-sided alpha=0.05; reject iff the one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0. Accuracies are seed-averaged per-item means on the 250-item externally-labelled d-qa-t-plain eval set. NARROWED ESTIMAND: this decides only whether the generic store's lift is POSITIVE under independent gold - never 'as well as the kernel'

STAGE-1 endorsement statistic on the plain store, split per readiness finding 3: AFFIRMATIVE non-endorsement (FAIL, kill d') iff one-sided 95% Wilson UPPER bound < 0.70; endorsement-not-demonstrated (INCONCLUSIVE stop) iff one-sided 95% Wilson LOWER bound < 0.70 without d'; both evaluable before any stage-2 GPU spend

PASS-GATE-BEARING opaque negative control (readiness finding 2): affirmative rejection = one-sided 95% Wilson UPPER bound of A_opaque < 0.70 (the bar plain must clear from below); a PASS requires this true AND /analysis/opaque_adjudication_valid true AND the record present (absence => the PASS rule cannot evaluate => INCOMPLETE-DATA). Powered pessimistically: Wilson-UB at A=0.5, n~340 ~0.545 < 0.70 (no wilson_gate block: this is an upper-bound gate; the freeze-time wilson_gate lint covers lower-bound gates only)

G-adj INSTRUMENT gate on the plain adjudication (not a hypothesis test): n_adjudicated >= 300 AND unresolved-disagreement <= 15% AND raw two-judge agreement >= 0.80; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (judge-quality events never read as evidence)

RT-7a engagement INSTRUMENT gate over plain-verify-retry cells: decidable_fraction >= 0.95 AND attempt-0 rejection rate in [0.05, 0.95] AND >= 1 final answer differing from attempt 0; missing engagement block => gate failure; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID

in-run extraction INSTRUMENT gate (store-appropriate; replaces the kernel-rendered d-xif P10 instrument - documented deviation): pooled one-sided 95% Wilson LOWER bound of extraction SUCCESS over the plain-verify verify calls >= 0.90 (equivalently failure Wilson UPPER bound <= 0.10); missing counters => gate failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID

headroom INSTRUMENT gate, STAGED (readiness finding 4): acc_ext(R1-alone, 3-seed mean) <= 0.85, emitted by the pinned analysis from R1-alone data alone at stage 2b-i so saturation fires INSTRUMENT-INVALID before the remaining cells are bought; never NULL/FAIL. Guarded pre-spend by the stage-0 pilot stop rule (Wilson-LB > 0.75 => STOP)

plain-external-gold separation INSTRUMENT gate, pre-declared (gates ONLY the noninferiority_vs_r3 Holm membership): acc_ext(R3-alone) - acc_ext(R1-alone) >= 0.05 (3-seed mean) AND one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0; on failure that secondary leaves the Holm family BEFORE any p-value comparison; the absolute primary still reads

H-STRUCT carry-over on plain external gold, THE load-bearing control: recovery = (acc_ext(shuffled-plain,k=4) - acc_ext(R1-alone)) / (acc_ext(plain-verify,k=4) - acc_ext(R1-alone)); passes iff the one-sided 95% BCa upper bound < 0.30; Holm within F-secondary(gsx0). The KILL (b) fires on the POINT estimate >= 0.30 ONLY when the primary rejects (readiness finding 3)

RT-2 carry-over on plain external gold: one-sided paired bootstrap vs plain-gloss-text self-verify+retry at matched budget, both arms at k=4; the plain arm cannot PASS without beating this; Holm within F-secondary(gsx0) at alpha=0.05

acc_ext(135M+plain-verify,k=4) - acc_ext(1.7B-alone), one-sided 95% BCa lower bound >= 0 (absolute non-inferiority at margin 0); Holm within F-secondary(gsx0); CONDITIONAL on the separation gate. Forecast [MEASURED knull-v2 R3-alone-plain 0.948]: expected to fail; retained for mirror-fidelity, not load-bearing

DESCRIPTIVE ONLY (never Holm, never verdict-bearing): lift_mem - lift_ext on the same runs with 95% percentile CI, plus transfer_ratio = lift_ext/lift_mem - the circularity-signature diagnostic on the plain store

REPORTED-ONLY cross-experiment diagnostic (never Holm, never verdict-bearing; readiness findings 1+6): kernel_content_premium_ext = 0.25066666666666704 (the FROZEN f2b-transfer primary POINT ESTIMATE, treated as error-free, never co-resampled) - plain_ext_lift, with bootstrap CI on the plain lift only and premium_band_within_margin (|premium| CI inside +/-0.05) as a CONDITIONAL DESCRIPTIVE BAND - explicitly NOT a test of equivalence to the kernel effect; this disclosure travels verbatim with any readout that cites it
C-4 robustness gate, reported-only (does NOT gate the PASS): >= ceil(0.8 * n_seeds) = 3/3 seeds same-direction plain-verify lift over R1-alone on external gold

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on any verdict: 2 host rungs (135M, 1.7B) license a SIGN, not a slope; every claim is scoped to <=1.7B hosts, the kernel-covered templated definitional-QA family over the same 108 covered concepts RENDERED THROUGH THE PADDED PLAIN-DICTIONARY (or token-matched nonce) STORE, the fixed k=4 retry budget, and THIS gold standard - blind dual-judge external adjudication under the pinned d-adj-t protocol re-run on the generic surfaces, kernel-naive human judge-1 as sole gold source, judge panel and sourcing disclosed. Coverage disclosure (mandatory): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0 - MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, NOT general coverage; every accuracy claim is bounded to the kernel-covered slice. A PASS licenses exactly: kernel content is not NECESSARY for a positive externally-adjudicated verify-retry lift on this line - a generic, token-matched plain-dictionary store produces a real, content-specific (shuffled-controlled), blindly-endorsed external-gold lift at this scope. A PASS does NOT license: any kernel-vs-plain magnitude claim ('transfers as well as the kernel', 'kernel-content premium is zero' - the premium diagnostic treats the frozen f2b-transfer point estimate as error-free and is a conditional descriptive band, never evidence of equivalence); any statement that the kernel is worse; external question-STYLE ecological validity (public-benchmark surfaces remain unmeasured - the deterministic verifier cannot engage them, MEASURED in f2b-replicate's d-ext slice); any coverage-general claim; any PRM-class comparison; any slope or >1.7B effect size. A FAIL by kill (d') or a NULL licenses exactly: the PADDED plain construction fails this test where the kernel construction passed it - and NOTHING kernel-distinctive without BOTH pre-registered follow-ups: (i) the MANDATORY concise-plain sensitivity (a successor record adjudicating the non-padded 0.66x plain surfaces; padding changes fluency/salience/adjudication surface, so a padded-store negative is ambiguous between content and padding artefact) and (ii) a direct kernel-vs-plain difference/interaction test - 'kernel significant previously, plain not significant now' is never evidence the effects differ. A FAIL by kills (b)/(c) is scoped to the plain store's established lift being structure or commodity verification; no kernel claim either way. The opaque control read is about the INSTRUMENT (external gold detects non-content), never a hypothesis outcome. This record is not a four-condition kernel-specific result and amends neither knull-v2 nor f2b-transfer.
hypotheses: H-GT (generic-transfer, deflationary, load-bearing): the PLAIN (generic, non-kernel, token-matched) store's verify-retry lift over R1-alone is POSITIVE when item gold is adjudicated independently of the store by blind judges (d-adj-t protocol on plain surfaces) - operationalised as absolute superiority of plain-verify-retry (fixed k=4) over R1-alone on plain-externally-adjudicated gold, content-specific per the shuffled control and non-commodity per the gloss-self control => kernel content is not NECESSARY for a positive external-gold lift on this line

H-KC (kernel-content-under-external-gold, the alternative, killed or supported symmetrically): the plain construction fails blind external adjudication AFFIRMATIVELY (stage-1 Wilson-UB of A_plain < 0.70 => FAIL at ~$0 GPU) or the plain system lift is affirmatively absent (TOST equivalence to R1-alone at h=0.2 => NULL); interpretive scope bounded by the envelope - no kernel-distinctive claim without the mandatory concise-plain sensitivity AND a direct kernel-vs-plain difference test

H-INSTR (opaque negative control, PASS-gate-bearing): blind external gold is not a rubber stamp - the token-matched nonce store's content is AFFIRMATIVELY rejected by blind judges (one-sided 95% Wilson UPPER bound of A_opaque < 0.70, the same bar plain must clear from below); a PASS requires this control present, G-adj-valid, and rejecting; a permissive/missing opaque blocks PASS and is an instrument finding, never a hypothesis outcome

H-STRUCT carry-over on plain external gold: any established plain lift must remain plain-CONTENT-specific - the seed-pinned shuffled-record derangement at identical retry topology and cost recovers <30% of it (kill b otherwise, gated on an established primary)
kill_criterion_verbatim: gsx0 kills (fixed pre-registered k=4, 250 externally-labelled plain-surface items, 3 seeds; every accuracy on BLIND-ADJUDICATED external gold under the d-adj-t protocol re-run on the plain-rendered surfaces, human judge-1 sole gold source): (d') STAGE-1, BEFORE ANY GPU - plain external endorsement A_plain (share of resolved blind adjudications where external gold equals plain membership gold; concordant cannot-say counts as disagreement) has one-sided 95% Wilson UPPER bound < 0.70 => AFFIRMATIVE non-endorsement: the plain store's own content fails blind external adjudication and the experiment FAILS at ~$0 GPU. A one-sided 95% Wilson LOWER bound < 0.70 WITHOUT the upper-bound kill is endorsement-not-demonstrated: the experiment STOPS at ~$0 GPU with verdict INCONCLUSIVE - mere non-rejection is never a FAIL. (b) SHUFFLED-plain-verify recovers >= 30% of plain-verify's external-gold lift-over-alone (point estimate), evaluated ONLY when the primary rejects => the established lift is retry-against-any-oracle STRUCTURE, not plain-store content => FAIL. (c) plain-gloss-text self-verify closes as much external-gold lift at <= matched FLOPs/query (F0 ledger, point estimates), evaluated ONLY when the primary rejects => commodity-verification kill => FAIL. Affirmative absence of the plain lift is the NULL branch: TOST equivalence of plain-verify to R1-alone at margin Cohen's h = 0.2. Mere non-rejection of the primary without TOST equivalence is INCONCLUSIVE, never FAIL. PILOT STOP (pre-verdict, binding, stage 0): the experiment stops pre-spend iff the one-sided 95% Wilson LOWER bound of the pilot pooled R1-alone external-gold accuracy on the first-60 pinned-rank adjudicated items > 0.75 (= headroom cap 0.85 minus powered Delta 0.10); binary STOP/PROCEED, disclosed, never any other use. Degeneracy discipline: verifier non-engagement (RT-7a), in-run extraction failure (success Wilson-LB < 0.90, equivalently failure Wilson-UB > 0.10), judge-quality failure (G-adj), and baseline saturation (headroom, evaluable at stage 2b-i from R1-alone data alone) are INSTRUMENT-INVALID by pre-registered gates - they can never read as FAIL, PASS, or NULL. A PASS additionally REQUIRES the present, G-adj-valid opaque negative control to be affirmatively rejected (one-sided 95% Wilson UPPER bound of A_opaque < 0.70); a permissive or missing opaque control blocks PASS (INCONCLUSIVE / INCOMPLETE-DATA), never FAILs the plain store.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

model_revisions._note: pinned directly at design time (same revisions as f2b-transfer/knull-v2; backends already built and Modal-smoked there); NO PRM in this design

reuse_overrides.reason: DELIBERATE FRESH RE-RUN (fresh-runs pre-commitment, prereg_doc section 5): no logged f2/f2b/f2b-transfer/knull cell can serve as this record's arm outputs even in principle - (1) the eval corpora are NEW (d-qa-t-plain/-opaque store-injected surfaces, prompt-surface-disjoint from d-qa/d-qa-r/d-qa-t by fail-closed LC8p), (2) every endpoint is scored against blind externally-adjudicated plain-surface gold (d-adj-t-plain) that exists for no logged row, and (3) this design pre-commits to fresh final-phase runs for every cell; the practice-5 reuse-check is still run and recorded pre-spend with this entry as the recorded decision

runner_constraints.hardware: single GPU (A100-40GB or A10G); image + GPU class pinned inside the harness_manifest staged bytes before any final-phase run
runner_constraints.harness: poc/gsx0 (stage-1 adjudication tooling + stage-2 GPU runner: a mechanical store-swap adaptation of poc/f2b-transfer/runner/f2bt_runner.py using the knull store-injection mechanism; poc/f2b-transfer is left byte-identical to its pin). The runner MUST emit per stage-2 cell: metrics.eval_items_sha256 (sha256 of the pinned eval item-id list in order), the verifier_engagement block, and n_verify_calls + n_extraction_failures on plain-verify cells; the pinned analysis hard-fails without them. STAGE DISCIPLINE: pilot stop rule -> stage-1 adjudication records + verdict-gen PRECEDE any stage-2 GPU; reuse-check + dry-plan + green mock precede the staged final run (2b-i R1-alone -> verdict-gen -> 2b-ii); auto-authorization under $100 applies ONLY after maintainer sign-off of this design

title: gsx0 generic-store-external-gold - the missing content-attribution diagonal: the f2b-transfer two-stage external-adjudication machinery re-run with the store swapped from kernel to the token-matched GENERIC plain dictionary (knull-v2 plain-padded, 0.99x) on injected d-qa-t skeletons (identical across store conditions by construction), with a pre-GPU stage-1 endorsement read split into AFFIRMATIVE non-endorsement (FAIL, Wilson-UB) vs not-demonstrated (INCONCLUSIVE, Wilson-LB), a PASS-gate-bearing affirmatively-rejected opaque nonce control, a binding blinded first-60 headroom PILOT (stop pre-spend if Wilson-LB of R1-alone pilot accuracy > 0.75), a STAGED final run (R1-alone first; headroom INSTRUMENT-INVALID before the remaining cells are bought), kills b/c gated on an established primary, a reachable TOST NULL branch, and a NARROWED estimand: PASS = kernel content is not necessary for a positive external-gold lift (never 'as well as the kernel'; the kernel-vs-plain premium is a reported-only conditional descriptive diagnostic). Right-sized: 250 items, 3 seeds, fixed k=4, plain store only at stage 2; ~$6-10 all-in, $16 ceiling; can FAIL for ~$0 GPU and STOP for ~$1-2
